text.title: Context Window Curation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the per-task context bundle artefact. Agent loads only what the bundle declares.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "ctx-task-4421", "task_id": "TICKET-4421", "task_description": "Add /v2/quote endpoint with EUR-PT FX rounding fixed", "files": [ {"path": "AGENTS.md", "role": "agents-md", "tokens": 1200}, {"path": "src/orders/quote.py", "role": "target", "tokens": 1500}, {"path": "src/orders/types.py", "role": "type", "tokens": 600}, {"path": "src/api/router.py", "role": "caller", "tokens": 900} ], "agents_md_included": true, "glossary": "FX = foreign exchange; round-half-up = banker rounding alternative; shadow = dark-launch traffic to new path while old still serves canonical.", "exclusions": ["tests/", "migrations/", "vendor/", "generated/"], "total_tokens": 4200, "budget_tokens": 6000, "verdict": "commit-bundle", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: artefact_id missing ctx- prefix; task_description too short; file.role not in enum; tokens exceeds max; agents_md_included=false (r2 violation); glossary empty (r4); exclusions empty (r5); total exceeds budget (r3); version + last_reviewed malformed.

antipattern.reason: r3 violation; over-budget bundle drops agent quality.
r2 violation; missing AGENTS.md is the principal drift source.

antipattern.description: files contain more than 2 entries with role=caller.
antipattern.reason: r1 cap; deeper coupling chains harm context quality.
